auth.subtitle: Your safety companion for minibus taxi travel in South Africa
auth.agreeTerms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.smsHelper: We'll send you a 6-digit verification code via SMS
auth.invalidNumberDesc: Please enter a valid South African phone number.
auth.couldntSendDesc: Please check your connection and try again.

otp.title: Verify your number
otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to
otp.failedDesc: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
otp.codeSentDesc: A new verification code is on its way.

profile.setupSubtitle: A few quick details so we can personalize your Haibo experience
profile.handleHint: Shown on your posts and comments instead of your phone number
profile.tapToChange: Tap the circle to change it
profile.photoRecognize: Makes it easier for drivers and vendors to recognize you
profile.permissionNeededDesc: Grant photo library access to upload a profile photo.

emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.locationShared: Your location has been shared with emergency responders
emergency.locationOff: Location off — tap to enable in settings
emergency.contactHint: Notified when you trigger SOS. You can add more contacts later.

ranks.noPhotos: No photos yet — be the first to help commuters find this rank.

rating.title: Rate Your Trip
rating.subtitle: Help improve safety for everyone
rating.linked: Your feedback has been submitted and linked to the driver's record.
rating.unlinked: Your feedback has been submitted to the Taxi Association.
rating.incompleteDesc: Please rate the driver, rate the rank, and enter the taxi plate number.
rating.photoUploadFailedDesc: We'll submit your rating without the photo. You can add media later.
rating.permissionNeededDesc: Camera access is required to take photos.

share.title: Share
share.watermarkNote: Shared with Haibo! branding + app download link
share.shareFooter: Share this reel with your friends and family
share.appNotInstalled: {{name}} is not installed on your device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage notifications, privacy, and account preferences.
settings.pushHint: Alerts for SOS, payments, and updates
settings.exportHint: See what we have on file (POPIA §23)
settings.signOutConfirm: You'll need to sign back in to access your account.
settings.deleteConfirm: This will permanently lock your account, anonymize your profile, and schedule remaining data for purge within 30 days. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm2: Tap Delete below to permanently close your Haibo! account.

onboarding.safetyDesc: One-tap SOS and live location sharing keep you covered on every ride.
onboarding.findRanksDesc: Discover taxi ranks and routes across South Africa with real-time updates.
onboarding.communityDesc: Share rides, lost-and-found, and safety alerts with commuters near you.
onboarding.smartPayDesc: Cashless payments to drivers and ranks — fast, secure, and tracked.
onboarding.privacyDesc: Haibo! is a safety app, so we take data seriously. Before you get started, please read how we collect and protect your information under South Africa's POPIA, and what you can expect from us.
onboarding.acceptTerms: I've read and accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service, and I understand Haibo!'s SOS feature is not a substitute for emergency services.
